description:
Closing Date: 2pm Friday 13 March 2026 
face2face reference: 666765 
Locations: Canberra and Adelaide 
Contract Duration: 12 months + 2X12-month extension/s

Why Join?

Shape data-driven decisions supporting legislative and government initiatives
Design, deliver, and optimise secure AWS data platforms and pipelines
Contribute to digital transformation and innovation across cloud environments
Be part of a team driving efficiency and excellence in data engineering
Play a key role in delivering critical data solutions to meet legislative requirements
Work with cutting-edge AWS technologies and grow your technical expertise

About the Role

Working with technologies like AWS S3, Glue, Lambda, Step Functions, Kinesis, and Redshift, this role enhances cloud data capabilities, collaborates with stakeholders, and supports critical decision-making processes to deliver reliable, secure, and scalable solutions.

Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain secure and scalable AWS-based data pipelines
Build and optimise batch and streaming data workflows using AWS services
Collaborate with delivery teams, security teams, and stakeholders to align solutions with business objectives
Apply AWS security best practices, including IAM, encryption, and network design
Implement CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code using Terraform or AWS CDK
Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimise data solutions for performance, reliability, and cost efficiency

Skills & Experience

Strong proficiency in Python, Scala, and Java for data engineering solutions
Hands-on experience with Apache Spark, Delta Lake, Parquet, and data lake architectures=
Proven delivery of end-to-end data pipelines from ingestion to curated outputs
Experience with AWS data services including S3, Glue, Lambda, Step Functions, Kinesis, Redshift, and Athena
Knowledge of DevOps/GitOps, CI/CD, and version control processes
Excellent analytical, problem-solving, communication, and teamwork skills

Australian Citizenship & Baseline security clearance is a mandatory requirement for this position. 

If you have any questions or would like more details, don’t hesitate to reach out to Urvish Kahar at urvish.kahar@f2frecruitment.com.au.
